gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.ocr_text: RIJKSHERBARIUM 00. MRT 99 01884 LEIDEN L.3800382 Plants of Sichuan, China Quercus oxyodon Miquel Dujiangyan Municipality (formerly Guan Xian); W side of the Longxi River upstream from the town of Longxi between the Longxi River and the vicinity of the Luojiaping Forest Farm. Tree 7 m tall, leaves glaucous on undersurface. In remnant fagaceous forest on ridgetop. Elevation 1560 m D. E. Boufford & B. Bartholomew 24898, 15 September 1988 with G. Li & G. H. Zhu Arnold Arboretum of Harvard University (A), California Academy of Sciences (CAS), & Institute of Botany, Beijing (PE) Naturalis Biodiversity Center
